title: Emerging research themes in macrophage-associated research for esophageal cancer: a bibliometric and visualized analysis.
snippet: Tumor-associated macrophages (TAMs) are key regulators of the esophageal cancer microenvironment and are increasingly implicated in immune suppression, tumor invasion, metastasis, and therapeutic resistance. With the rapid expansion of immunotherapy research and high-dimensional profiling technologies, a systematic and quantitative overview of this field is...

title: Integrating single-cell and spatial transcriptomics to decipher the neuro-immune microenvironment of breast cancer brain metastasis: a key regulatory axis, prognostic model, and drug discovery.
snippet: Breast cancer brain metastasis (BCBM) is a lethal complication of advanced disease, facilitated by a specialized neuro-immune microenvironment, whereas its molecular regulators and spatial dynamics remain poorly understood. This study aimed to resolve cellular heterogeneity and intercellular signaling networks crosstalk in BCBM microenvironment by using int...
